definition_point: src/lib/server/archive/workflow.js - createReportPayload() derives rootCid from manifest.rootCid || report.rootCid

storage_points.semantics: must match manifest.rootCid when report is loaded/saved

export_usage.behavior: export blocks if rootCid missing or not in archive file set

ui_display.label: Root / Root CID
ui_display.behavior: UI prefers manifest.rootCid, then report.rootCid, then source_inputs[0].canonical

semantic_ambiguity: rootCid is currently treated as a derived/export-facing identifier and may fall back to the first canonical IPFS reference instead of a proven DAG root.
notes: There is no hard semantic reset in current implementation.
Current export validation checks presence in file set, not full graph completeness.
This supports the roadmap conclusion: stabilize contracts before deeper modularization.
